title: ixeris grandicolla
intro: Ixeris grandicolla, also known as the crested daisy or small daisy, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ixeris grandicolla are attributed to its ability to relieve symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a remedy for skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and teas that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
